_readme: Maps downloaded pixel-art packs into the world. See README.md. Empty/missing entries fall back to the world's procedural art, so this file is safe to leave partly filled. STEPS: (1) put the pack PNG(s) in this folder; (2) add each to 'atlases' with a unique id + filename; (3) fill each sprite/tile's pixel coords x,y,w,h within its atlas. The 5 structures below become department workstations (see DEPT_STATION in tab-world.js).

tiles._note: OPTIONAL terrain override — map our tile keys to atlas cells (16x16) to replace procedural tiles. Leave empty to keep procedural terrain.
